sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40445" key="e)piparorma/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπαρ-ορμάω</orth>, <sense id="n40445.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">stir up yet more</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρὸς τὸν πόλεμον</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.118f</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
